diagrams.title: Whitney's Theorem Inequality
diagrams.description: Shows relationship κ(G) ≤ λ(G) ≤ δ(G) with three concentric regions
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the ordering and inequality between three connectivity measures

diagrams.title: Edge-Connectivity Examples
diagrams.description: Different graph types with their edge-connectivity values
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for connectivity values of common graph families

diagrams.title: Bridge in Graph
diagrams.description: Graph with a bridge edge highlighted - removal disconnects graph
elements: Endpoint vertices with degree 1 in cut
diagrams.purpose: Understand bridge concept and λ=1 condition

diagrams.title: Edge Cut Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows minimum edge cut separating vertices into two sets
diagrams.purpose: Understand edge cut concept for Menger's theorem
